/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags   -o kcm_cdedecoration.so CMakeFiles/kcm_cdedecoration.dir/kcm_cdedecoration_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_cdedecoration.dir/src/cdedecorationkcm.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtils.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigWidgets.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6WidgetsAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ColorScheme.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsQuick.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigGui.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
